lede: A look at March 30 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Anastasia Potapova and Samantha Stosur, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Donald Trump
events.desc: Donald Trump becomes the first former United States president to be indicted by a grand jury.

events.title: Space Shuttle program
events.desc: Space Shuttle program: STS-3 mission is completed with the landing of Columbia at White Sands Missile Range, New Mexico.

events.title: Vietnam War
events.desc: Vietnam War: A car bomb explodes in front of the United States Embassy, Saigon, killing 22 and wounding 183 others.

events.title: Cold War
events.desc: Cold War: A riot breaks out in Austurvöllur square in Reykjavík, when Iceland joins NATO.

events.title: March Days
events.desc: Beginning of the bloody March Events in Baku and other locations of Baku Governorate.

events.title: Commission on Isotopic Abundances and Atomic Weights
events.desc: German Society of Chemistry issues an invitation to other national scientific organizations to appoint delegates to the International Committee on Atomic Weights.

events.title: George I of Greece
events.desc: Danish prince Wilhelm Georg is chosen as King George of Greece.

events.title: Diethyl ether
events.desc: Ether anesthesia is used for the first time, in an operation by the American surgeon Dr. Crawford Long.

events.title: Joachim Murat
events.desc: Joachim Murat issues the Rimini Proclamation, among the earliest calls for Italian unification.

births.name: Friedrich August Freiherr von der Heydte
Charles Lightoller
births.line: English 2nd officer on the RMS Titanic (died 1952)

deaths.text: Chan Santokhi, Surinamese politician, 9th President of Suriname
Martin Sandberger, German SS officer and convicted war criminal
Queen Elizabeth the Queen Mother, of the United Kingdom

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Amadeus IX, Duke of Savoy
Christian feast day: Blessed Maria Restituta Kafka
Christian feast day: Thomas Son Chasuhn, Marie-Nicolas-Antoine Daveluy (part of The Korean Martyrs)
